docstrings.scrapy.core.downloader.handlers.ftp.FTPD: FTP download handler for Scrapy that handles asynchronous FTP file downloads and emulates an HTTP response.
Downloads a file from an FTP server based on the provided request and returns an HTTP response.
docstrings.scrapy.core.downloader.handlers.ftp.Rece: Protocol to handle data received from an FTP server and store it either in memory or a local file.
Closes the data storage (file or in-memory buffer) after receiving the complete file.
Handles incoming data chunks from the FTP server and writes them to the storage.
Returns the local filename where the FTP file is stored, if specified.
